title: coffea lemblinii
intro: Coffea lemblinii, a rare and lesser-known species of coffee plant native to Madagascar, is a type of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain due to its high levels of caffeine and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Coffea lemblinii include improved cognitive function, increased energy, and potential anti-inflammatory effects. Herbal preparations of Coffea lemblinii can be consumed as a tea, powder, or extract, although more research is needed to fully understand its uses and potential side effects.
